[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Rufarr''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who ferried [[Prime Minister (Bakura)|Prime Minister]] [[Molierre Cundertol]] to and from his [[entechment]]. He piloted the ''[[Jaunty Cavalier]]''. He was killed when his ship exploded returning to [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]].

{{Char-stub}}
